text: Sand jet - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a blinding effect to them.
Burial - spawns falling sand over the entity.
Sandstorm - creates a sandstorm that damages all entities within it for a while.
Sandstorm: 10% chance to apply random debuff — "Blindness", "Slowness", or "Stun" for 10 sec.
Dune: –75% fall damage, –25% damage from mobs/players.
